SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class AntiSurgeRecycleCalculator.Result

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.AntiSurgeRecycleCalculator.Result
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
AntiSurgeRecycleCalculator
public static class AntiSurgeRecycleCalculator.Result extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable result of an anti-surge recycle calculation.
Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private final double
    controlFlow
    Anti-surge control flow in m3/hr (surge flow times the margin).
    private final boolean
    converged
    Whether the fixed-point iteration converged within the tolerance.
    private final double
    distanceToSurge
    Compressor distance to surge (dimensionless) at the converged state.
    private final double
    inletVolumeFlow
    Compressor inlet actual volumetric flow in m3/hr at the converged state.
    private final int
    iterations
    Number of fixed-point iterations performed.
    private final boolean
    recycleActive
    Whether a recycle was required to stay off the surge control line.
    private final double
    recycleMassFlow
    Converged recycle mass flow in kg/hr.
    private final StreamInterface
    recycleStream
    The converged recycle stream, or null when no recycle was required.
    private static final long
    serialVersionUID
    Serialization version UID.
    private final double
    surgeFlow
    Compressor surge flow in m3/hr at the running head.

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      Serialization version UID.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • recycleActive

      private final boolean recycleActive
      Whether a recycle was required to stay off the surge control line.

    • recycleMassFlow

      private final double recycleMassFlow
      Converged recycle mass flow in kg/hr.

    • recycleStream

      private final transient StreamInterface recycleStream
      The converged recycle stream, or null when no recycle was required.

    • distanceToSurge

      private final double distanceToSurge
      Compressor distance to surge (dimensionless) at the converged state.

    • inletVolumeFlow

      private final double inletVolumeFlow
      Compressor inlet actual volumetric flow in m3/hr at the converged state.

    • surgeFlow

      private final double surgeFlow
      Compressor surge flow in m3/hr at the running head.

    • controlFlow

      private final double controlFlow
      Anti-surge control flow in m3/hr (surge flow times the margin).

    • iterations

      private final int iterations
      Number of fixed-point iterations performed.

    • converged

      private final boolean converged
      Whether the fixed-point iteration converged within the tolerance.

  • Constructor Details

    • Result

      public Result(boolean recycleActive, double recycleMassFlow, StreamInterface recycleStream, double distanceToSurge, double inletVolumeFlow, double surgeFlow, double controlFlow, int iterations, boolean converged)
      Constructs an anti-surge recycle result.
      Parameters:
      recycleActive - whether a recycle was required
      recycleMassFlow - the converged recycle mass flow in kg/hr
      recycleStream - the converged recycle stream, or null when inactive
      distanceToSurge - the compressor distance to surge at the converged state
      inletVolumeFlow - the compressor inlet actual volumetric flow in m3/hr
      surgeFlow - the compressor surge flow in m3/hr at the running head
      controlFlow - the anti-surge control flow in m3/hr
      iterations - the number of fixed-point iterations performed
      converged - whether the iteration converged within the tolerance

  • Method Details

    • isRecycleActive

      public boolean isRecycleActive()
      Whether a recycle was required to keep the machine off the surge control line.
      Returns:
      true if a recycle was opened

    • getRecycleMassFlow

      public double getRecycleMassFlow()
      Get the converged recycle mass flow.
      Returns:
      the recycle mass flow in kg/hr

    • getRecycleStream

      public StreamInterface getRecycleStream()
      Get the converged recycle stream.
      Returns:
      the recycle stream, or null when no recycle was required

    • getDistanceToSurge

      public double getDistanceToSurge()
      Get the compressor distance to surge at the converged state.
      Returns:
      the dimensionless distance to surge

    • getInletVolumeFlow

      public double getInletVolumeFlow()
      Get the compressor inlet actual volumetric flow at the converged state.
      Returns:
      the inlet volumetric flow in m3/hr

    • getSurgeFlow

      public double getSurgeFlow()
      Get the compressor surge flow at the running head.
      Returns:
      the surge flow in m3/hr

    • getControlFlow

      public double getControlFlow()
      Get the anti-surge control flow.
      Returns:
      the control flow in m3/hr

    • getIterations

      public int getIterations()
      Get the number of fixed-point iterations performed.
      Returns:
      the iteration count

    • isConverged

      public boolean isConverged()
      Whether the fixed-point iteration converged within the tolerance.
      Returns:
      true if converged
